source: Creator Monetize — Short Form Video Formats + Content Ascendancy

sitting_static.name: Sitting/Static
sitting_static.description: Direct-to-camera, seated. Most common for educational content.

walkthrough.name: Walkthrough
walkthrough.description: Screen recording or demo with voiceover

text_overlay.name: Text Overlay / B-Roll
text_overlay.description: Background video with text overlay and voiceover

algorithm_principles.core_equation: Grab Attention + Hold Attention = Mass Reach
algorithm_principles.platform_motivation: Platforms maximize user retention → more ads → more revenue
algorithm_principles.what_matters: Average viewer retention, NOT follower count
algorithm_principles.proof: 30% increase in retention = difference between 296K and 1.3M views
algorithm_principles.discovery: Most views come from suggested/explore/FYP — NOT SEO or link sharing

content_protocol.cook_time: Let cook 10 hours before checking metrics
